title: Moderation Actions — 2026-04-28
body:
The moderation team has completed a full triage of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42: Permanently banned for distributing phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner: Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (1)**
- bot_like_user_77: Issued a formal warning for posting repeated near-identical automated-looking replies in help channels. Further violations will result in a ban.

**No Action (3)**
- trusted_helper (report_003): Report arose from a single-user moderation disagreement. No policy violation found; report closed.
- new_member_17 (report_004): Minor formatting issue; no sanction warranted.
- core_maintainer (report_006): Confirmed false positive — reports were part of a coordinated brigading campaign following a legitimate moderation decision. No action taken.

All 6 reports have been reviewed and closed. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. If you witness abuse, please continue to use the report system.
